title: Clean up code style and pseudo-private member usage in `passes/cmds/select.cc`
body:
Also adds a `contains()` member function to `ObjRange` in `kernel/rtlil.h`.

I think a benchmark comparison with and without this PR must be done before merging.  My concern is that in the original code, `it` has the `RTLIL::IdString` local, next to the `RTLIL::Module *` in memory.  In the new code that uses the `ObjRange` accessor functions, the name that is passed to many functions no longer local.  Instead, it's an indirect jump away, at e.g. `wire->name`.
